rationale: In the methods section for Study 3, the authors explicitly state that their financial risk-taking measure is adapted from Han et al. (2019), giving the cited paper a concrete design role. This is more than a background mention because it informs how the key dependent variable is operationalized in the experiment. The citing paper does not build on Han et al.'s political identity theory or test or refine its mechanism, so the relation is best characterized as applying a prior measure rather than extending or challenging that work.
relation_description: The citing paper adapts its experimental financial risk-taking allocation measure from Han et al. (2019) (along with He et al. 2008) in Study 3. It uses that prior operationalization in a different theoretical context focused on end-of-period temporal landmarks and optimism.
